mapper.select:
SELECT id, app_id, permission_id, tenant_id, permisssion_type, status, create_by, create_time, last_update_by, last_update_time FROM openplatform_app_permission_t WHERE status = 1
AND id IN
#{id}
ORDER BY id
SELECT id, app_id, permission_id, tenant_id, permisssion_type, status, create_by, create_time, last_update_by, last_update_time FROM openplatform_app_permission_t WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, permission_name_cn, permission_name_en, module_id, scope_id, permisssion_type, is_approval_required, auth_type, status FROM openplatform_permission_t WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, event_name_cn, event_name_en, module_id, topic, event_type, is_approval_required, status FROM openplatform_event_t WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, api_name_cn, api_name_en, module_id, path, method, auth_type, status FROM openplatform_permission_api_t WHERE path = #{path} AND method = #{method} AND status = 1 LIMIT 1
SELECT id, event_name_cn, event_name_en, module_id, topic, event_type, is_approval_required, status FROM openplatform_event_t WHERE topic = #{topic} AND status = 1 LIMIT 1

SELECT eflow_id, eflow_type, eflow_status, eflow_submit_user, eflow_submit_message, eflow_audit_user, eflow_audit_message, resource_type, resource_id, resource_info, resource_delta, tenant_id, status, create_time FROM openplatform_eflow_t WHERE resource_type = #{resourceType} AND resource_id = #{resourceId} AND status = 1
SELECT eflow_log_id, eflow_log_trace_id, eflow_log_type, eflow_log_user, eflow_log_message, status, create_time FROM openplatform_eflow_log_t WHERE eflow_log_trace_id = #{eflowId} AND status = 1

SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN property_name = 'event_msg_recive_mode' THEN CAST(property_value AS UNSIGNED) END) AS channelType, MAX(CASE WHEN property_name = 'event_push_url' THEN property_value END) AS channelAddress, MAX(CASE WHEN property_name = 'event_push_auth_type' THEN CAST(property_value AS UNSIGNED) END) AS authType FROM openplatform_app_p_t WHERE parent_id = #{appId} AND status = 1 AND property_name IN ('event_msg_recive_mode', 'event_push_url', 'event_push_auth_type')

SELECT id, app_id, permission_id, status, channel_type, channel_address, auth_type, approved_at, approved_by, create_time, last_update_time, create_by, last_update_by FROM openplatform_v2_subscription_t
WHERE id IN
#{id}
ORDER BY id

SELECT id, app_id, permission_id, status, channel_type, channel_address, auth_type, approved_at, approved_by, create_time, last_update_time, create_by, last_update_by FROM openplatform_v2_subscription_t WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, name_cn, name_en, scope, resource_type, resource_id, category_id, need_approval, resource_nodes, status FROM openplatform_v2_permission_t WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, name_cn, name_en, scope, resource_type, resource_id, category_id, need_approval, resource_nodes, status FROM openplatform_v2_permission_t WHERE resource_type = #{resourceType} AND resource_id = #{resourceId} AND status = 1 LIMIT 1
SELECT id, name_cn, name_en, path, method, auth_type, category_id, status FROM openplatform_v2_api_t WHERE path = #{path} AND method = #{method} AND status = 1 LIMIT 1
SELECT id, name_cn, name_en, topic, category_id, status FROM openplatform_v2_event_t WHERE topic = #{topic} AND status = 1 LIMIT 1

SELECT id, combined_nodes, business_type, business_id, applicant_id, applicant_name, status, current_node, create_time, last_update_time, completed_at FROM openplatform_v2_approval_record_t WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO openplatform_v2_approval_log_t ( id, record_id, node_index, level, operator_id, operator_name, action, comment, create_time ) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.recordId}, #{item.nodeIndex}, #{item.level}, #{item.operatorId}, #{item.operatorName}, #{item.action}, #{item.comment}, #{item.createTime})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE id = id

INSERT INTO openplatform_eflow_log_t ( eflow_log_id, eflow_log_trace_id, eflow_log_type, eflow_log_user, eflow_log_message, status, create_by, create_time ) VALUES
(#{item.eflowLogId}, #{item.eflowLogTraceId}, #{item.eflowLogType}, #{item.eflowLogUser}, #{item.eflowLogMessage}, #{item.status}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE eflow_log_id = eflow_log_id
